text.name_changer.usage:
Commands:
/nick <name> or /nick name <name>
/nick reset
/nick hide on|off (OP only)
(Hold U to show hidden names temporarily)
text.name_changer.nick_reset_none: You do not have a nickname to reset.
text.name_changer.nick_too_long: Nicknames can be at most %s characters long.
text.name_changer.hide_on: Hide all names enabled. Hold U to show hidden names temporarily.
